title: croton celtidifolius
intro: Croton celtidifolius, also known as the "Celtis-leaved Croton" or "Croton tree", is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Croton celtidifolius include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing pain. Herbal preparations of Croton celtidifolius include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
